description: Style Note denizen has captured a fun, casual look in their range of T-shirts. Well fitted, comfortable and not lacking in colour, you can pair this tee with jeans to look charmingly attractive. Casual and fun, you'll want these to be part of your casual wardrobe! Product Details Green T-shirt, has a round ribbed neckline, short sleeves and branding printed in front Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cold Tumble dry low Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
